  • Classes in org.apache.axis2.jaxws.client.async used by org.apache.axis2.jaxws.client.dispatch
    Class
    Description
    AsyncResponse
    The AsyncResponse class is used to collect the response information from Axis2 and deliver it to a JAX-WS client.
